description: Add devcontainer command to TUI view help text - In wt/pkg/tui/view.go around line 430-480, add '[i] devcontainer' command to the help text. Show this command only when .devcontainer folder does NOT exist (similar to how '[v] local.code-workspace' is conditionally shown). Use devcontainer.HasDevcontainer to check. Add to both ItemTypeProject and ItemTypeWorktree cases.
note: Added '[i] devcontainer' to help text in view.go for ItemTypeProject and ItemTypeWorktree cases. Uses devcontainer.HasDevcontainer to conditionally show the command only when .devcontainer doesn't exist. Imported devcontainer package in view.go.
acceptance_criteria: HasDevcontainer check added before displaying command
Command '[i] devcontainer' appears in help text when .devcontainer doesn't exist
Command appears for both project and worktree item types

verification.value: Run 'go run wt/main.go' and verify command appears for projects/worktrees without .devcontainer
